message.conversation:
BIBLE STUDY (LEVITICUS 7)
Theme: Gratitude, Holiness and Respect for God’s Sacred Things
Scripture Reading: Leviticus 7:1-38

✓ Context/Background
Leviticus 7 continues instructions about offerings, focusing on the guilt offering, peace offering and rules for priests and worshipers. God is establishing clear boundaries so that His people understand what is holy, what is common, and how to approach Him with reverence. This chapter also emphasizes thanksgiving, fellowship and obedience in handling sacred offerings.

✓ Key Lessons (Verse by Verse Simplified)
a. Verses 1-10: The guilt offering regulations and priestly portions.
👉 Lesson: Sin has consequences, and restoration must be done properly.
The priests receive their portion showing that God provides for those who serve Him.
👉 Lesson: God honors faithful service and ensures provision for His servants.

b. Verses 11-21: The peace offering (thanksgiving, vows, and voluntary worship).
👉 Lesson: Worship is not only about repentance it is also about gratitude and celebration.
Some offerings were eaten as a shared meal.
👉 Lesson: God desires fellowship, not just ritual sacrifice.

c. Verses 22-27: Warning against eating fat and blood.
👉 Lesson: God sets boundaries for holiness and obedience.
Life belongs to God, and blood represents life.
👉 Lesson: We must respect what God calls sacred.

d. Verses 28-36: The portions given to priests and rules of distribution.
👉 Lesson: God ensures fairness and order in His house.
Those who serve God are supported through His provision.
👉 Lesson: God is not disorganized everything in His kingdom has structure.

e. Verses 37-38: Summary of the offerings given at Mount Sinai.
👉 Lesson: God’s instructions are complete, clear and intentional.
Nothing in worship is random everything is guided by divine order.

✓ Spiritual Message
Leviticus 7 reveals that worship is both spiritual and structured. God is not only interested in sacrifice but also in obedience, gratitude and reverence.
He desires a people who understand holiness not as restriction, but as respect for His presence.

✓ Life Application
Live a life of gratitude, not just requests.
Respect God’s instructions and boundaries.
Serve God faithfully and trust His provision.
Value fellowship with God, not just religious duty.
Treat holy things with seriousness and honor.

✓ Reflection Questions
Do I worship God only when I need something, or also in gratitude?
Do I respect God’s boundaries in my life?
Am I living with awareness of God’s holiness?
Do I value fellowship with God daily?

Prayer: Father teach us to worship You with gratitude, obedience and reverence. Help us to respect what is holy and to live according to Your order. Let our hearts always be thankful and our lives pleasing before You. Draw us into deeper fellowship with You each day. In Jesus’ name, Amen 🙏

FASTING AND PRAYER 26TH JUNE 2026
THEME: THE MONTH OF HARVEST AND DIVINE FRUITFULNESS (REVELATION 22:2)
DAY 3️⃣ FRIDAY
Prayer focus: Rivers of life and continuous growth
Supporting scriptures: Ezekiel 42:7, Isaiah 58:11

INTERCESSORY PRAYERS:
Father in the mighty name of Jesus we thank You because You are the God who never grows weary and never abandons His children. On this third day of our fasting we stand before you this afternoon with hearts full of thanksgiving thank you for protection and gift of life from morning to this hour. Lord let Your river of life flow through every member of this prayer family visit those who are spiritually exhausted, restore those who have lost their passion for prayer, Your Word and Your presence let every dying spiritual altar receive fresh fire and fresh oil from heaven. We pray for those facing battles that no one knows about, strengthen them inwardly, encourage their hearts and remind them that You are fighting for them, let every burden become lighter through the power of the Holy Spirit.

Father let every delayed purpose begin to move forward, wherever there has been stagnation in our calling, ministry, career, business, education or destiny, release divine movement and continuous growth. We intercede for our families let Your peace reign in our homes, restore broken relationships, heal wounded hearts and establish unity, love and forgiveness among us. Lord preserve our children and the next generation, keep them from deception, evil influences, addiction, violence and every trap of the enemy. Draw them into Your purpose and let them grow in wisdom and the fear of God. We pray for those who are sick, weak or recovering, let the river of Your healing flow through their bodies, minds and spirits, strengthen them and restore them completely.

Father preserve us wherever we go, protect us on the roads, in our workplaces, businesses, schools, homes and every place our feet shall step, let no evil come near us or our loved ones. We declare that we shall not become spiritually dry, we shall not become weary in doing good and we shall continue to grow from glory to glory, from faith to faith and from strength to strength because the Lord Himself is our source in Jesus name we pray and believe 🙇‍♀️🤲🙏

The Danger of Forgetting God in Prosperity

Deuteronomy 8:11

“Be careful that you do not forget the Lord your God, failing to observe His commands, His laws and His decrees…”

One of the quietest spiritual battles begins not in hardship, but in comfort. Difficult seasons often push people toward God, but seasons of abundance can slowly make people believe they no longer need Him.

God warned Israel about entering a land filled with blessings because He knew the human heart can become distracted when needs are met. Houses, success, resources, and achievements can become so satisfying that dependence on God slowly fades.

The danger is not the blessing itself. God is the giver of good gifts. The danger comes when the gift becomes more important than the Giver. What was meant to be a testimony of God’s faithfulness can become a reason to stop seeking Him.

A person can lose spiritual sensitivity not only through suffering but also through comfort. Sometimes the greatest test is not what you do when you lack, but who you become when you have enough.

Never allow answered prayers to create distance from the One who answered them. The hand that provides today is the same hand that sustained you in yesterday’s battles.

Prayer: Lord keep our hearts grateful in every season. May blessings never replace our dependence on You. Teach us to remember Your faithfulness, honor You in abundance, and remain close to You whether we have much or little. In Jesus’ name, Amen.

FASTING AND PRAYER 26TH JUNE 2026
THEME: THE MONTH OF HARVEST AND DIVINE FRUITFULNESS (REVELATION 22:2)
DAY 3️⃣ FRIDAY
Prayer Focus: Rivers of life and continuous growth
Supporting scriptures: Ezekiel 47:12, Isaiah 58:11

EVENING PRAYER AND BREAKING OF THE FAST:
Father in the mighty name of Jesus we thank You for bringing us to the end of this third day of fasting, thank You for sustaining us with Your grace, strengthening us by Your Spirit and protecting us throughout this day we give You all the glory and honor. Lord thank You for refreshing our spirits and for the work You are doing in our lives, let every prayer we have offered and every sacrifice we have made during this fasting produce lasting fruit according to Your perfect will. As we prepare to break our fast we sanctify this food and drink in the name of Jesus, we declare by faith that this food represents the body of Christ broken for us and the drink represents His precious blood shed for our redemption. As we partake may our bodies receive strength, our spirits be refreshed and our hearts remain steadfast in Your presence.

Continue to remove every form of dryness, stagnation and weariness from our lives, let rivers of living water continue to flow through us, bringing spiritual growth, peace, wisdom and renewed strength. We declare that we shall continue to grow, flourish and bear fruit in every season because You are the source of our life in Jesus name 🙇‍♀️🤲🙏,,blessed breaking of the fast family may the Lord continually refresh your spirit and cause you to flourish like a tree planted by the rivers of living water in Jesus name ✨💫🙌🙏

Spaghetti minced meat inspo 🤤
* *Best* ❤️
* *Terrible* 🤮

> Chips masala


 *_Ingredients:_* 
500 g potatoes (or ready-made French fries)
2 tbsp cooking oil
1 medium onion, finely chopped
2 tomatoes, chopped (or 2 tbsp tomato sauce)
1 tsp garlic, minced
1 tsp ginger, minced
1 tsp paprika
½ tsp turmeric
1 tsp chili powder (optional)
1 tsp garam masala
Salt to taste
2 tbsp tomato ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce (optional)
Fresh coriander (cilantro), chopped

 *_Steps:_* 
 *Prepare the chips:* 
* Peel, cut and deep-fry potatoes until golden and crispy.
* Alternatively, use oven-baked or air-fried fries.
 *Make the masala sauce:* 
* Heat oil in a pan.
* Sauté onions until soft.
* Add garlic and ginger; cook for 1 minute.
* Add tomatoes and cook until they break down into a thick sauce.
* Stir in paprika, turmeric, chili powder, garam masala and salt.
* Add ketchup and chili sauce.
* Simmer for 2–3 minutes.
 *Combine:* 
* Add the hot chips to the pan.
* Toss gently until evenly coated with the masala sauce.
 *Serve:* 
* Garnish with fresh coriander.
* Serve immediately while hot.

🎗️Neymar
